content:
### More dev log!

Pushed a bunch of updates to the /Builder page today~

- Quick team lineup, pressing the button enters "quick lineup" mode, letting you pretty quickly click to add awakeners/wheels/covenants without having to do a bunch of manual drag/drop/selection etc.
  - Theres a few buttons like back/next/cancel/finish to let you navigate easier, but you can also click slots to "start from there" if that makes sense
  - This feature kinda took a lot of tinkering to get into a decent spot that feels nice to use, so any feedback is welcome here <:dizzy2:1356083001926221874> 

- I also added support for 1 Support awakener per "full plan", to kinda mirror how D-Tide works. This awakener ignores duplication rules so you can freely slot in wheels and such used by other teams.
  - This cannot be "manually" toggled, there will be a popup for it when you add a character the second time, and will be cleared if you remove the "support" tagged character.
  - There is also a toggle under sorting & toggles to completely turn off duplication rules, so that you can create your 24x4 teams if you'd like 

- There was some UI work on the teams section in general, an expanded mode toggle where you can more clearly see what is in each teams, displaying wheels and covenants for each character if you don't care too much about vertical space.
  - I also added drag/drop support for characters inbetween teams, its a bit finicky to use since there are a lot of rules to check for each swap, but it does work.

- Bunch of other minor bugfixes and improvements to the website, such as Ramona getting twice the levels in collections, some scaling stuff and yeah.. things! <:Pandia_love:1459078512303411261>
